executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON index file containing extracted keywords and one-sentence summaries for multiple project files, used for code documentation and search.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to DeepSeek's chat completions API, supporting streaming Server-Sent Events (SSE) and non-streaming JSON responses while injecting the API key from environment variables.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: This Netlify Edge Function forwards POST requests to a Railway-hosted service, using the request path suffix to route to the appropriate endpoint and adding authentication via a token from environment variables.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST search requests to the Firecrawl API, extracts title, URL, snippet, and domain from results, and returns them in a structured JSON array.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: This Netlify Edge Function returns the GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables in response to GET requests, with CORS headers for cross-origin access.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API, forwarding the request body and returning the JSON response with error handling.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: An edge function that proxies POST requests to OpenRouter's chat completions API, forwarding streaming or JSON responses while handling errors and authentication.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Injects a script into index.html to bypass a login gate during Netlify deploy previews.

preferences.json.summary: A configuration file for a self-improving bot specifying customization for clarification prompts, planning rules, execution style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: A React chat component that manages messages, tasks, input, and pending commands with state management from workspace and provider stores.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: A responsive header component for the chat app displaying the bot name and input fields for repository and branch with mobile adaptation.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: A React component that renders an input bar with a send button, adapting to mobile by changing layout and font size based on window width.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: A React component that displays a scrollable list of chat messages with different styles for user and agent roles, and auto-scrolls to the end.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: A React component that renders a list of tasks with status indicators (color-coded) and responsive design for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: A React component that displays a fixed toast notification with a border colored based on error or success.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: A class that orchestrates self-improvement runs using hierarchical task decomposition, LLM calls, GitHub integration, and persistent memory with timeout management.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory class accumulates all information gathered during an agentic run, storing file summaries, notes, and building a compact context string for the LLM prompt.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: agenticExecutor executes a single task using a read-before-write loop, pre-loading target files to obtain SHAs, and iterating with LLM calls to either read additional files or emit final code.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner explores a codebase to plan a change by iteratively reading candidate files and deciding when to stop, using LLM prompts and file summaries.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: chunkedIndexer builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in small groups, extracting keywords and summaries, and committing the resulting index back to the repo.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Creates a coordinated plan by grouping candidate files by top-level directory, launching parallel exploration agents for each directory, and merging their summaries via a coordinator agent to produce a plan with files or subGoals.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files by matching goal words against a keyword index (keywords.json) or falling back to filename scanning, scoring and returning the top 8 matches.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends existing planners by decomposing complex goals into 2-5 sub-goals using an LLM-based architect decision, then creating a hierarchical plan with tasks and a task queue.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides fuzzy matching with Levenshtein distance to return the best-matching command and its score.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest.json is loaded from the repository or builds one from source JS files using ManifestBuilder, caching it in the context.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks in parallel up to a maximum concurrency, using file locking to avoid conflicts by skipping tasks that touch files already being modified.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Provides functions to save and load the WorkingMemory to/from the repo under .self-improve/memory-<runId>.json, scoped by runId to prevent overwrites.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Uses an LLM to generate a plan (milestone title, analysis, and up to 4 tasks) based on discovered or given file context, outputting strictly JSON.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a GitHub pull request with a title derived from the goal and the current branch, returning the PR URL.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews completed tasks by fetching the committed files from the repo and using an LLM to check if the implementation matches the task description, returning PASS or ISSUES.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Initializes and manages a task queue with status transitions (TODO, DONE, FAILED) and provides functions to filter pending/done tasks and mark tasks by ID.

src/main.js.summary: Sets up services and imports for a React application, including GitHub, LLM, executor API, context builder, and a SelfImprover agent, with automatic loading of GitHub token from Netlify environment.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves preferences.json from a GitHub repository, merging with default preferences for agent behavior including clarification, planning, execution, and review settings.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides static methods to call an executor API through a Netlify proxy for linting and syntax checking, with fail-open behavior on network errors to avoid blocking commits.

src/services/github.js.summary: Handles GitHub API interactions including fetching file trees, loading base64-encoded file content, and committing multiple files with tree updates.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Provides a single point to call language models via Netlify edge proxies, with 20s timeout, fast-model override, thinking mode, and error handling.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: Polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly or times out, with methods to build preview URLs and run full smoke tests.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Manages LLM provider settings (provider, model, thinking mode, reasoning effort) using Zustand with localStorage persistence.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Manages workspace state (repo, branch, GitHub token, remember keys) using Zustand with persistence.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies to extract structured actions (update editor blocks and read file requests) from special skill tags.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Provides static methods to identify required files from a manifest and build a context string with target and related files while respecting a token budget.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph manifest for JavaScript files by parsing their imports and exports, resolving relative paths, and computing reverse dependencies.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Tests code in a sandboxed iframe by importing required modules, setting them on the iframe window, and running the code with a timeout, returning false on failure or timeout.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Removes block and line comments as well as blank lines from code to reduce prompt size.
